evidence.description: Verified: div[role='button'] with explicit onkeydown handler for Space/Enter per NFR-001
Verified: test 'row uses div[role="button"] element (NFR-001)' confirms element type change
Negative tests only: Space/Enter in CodeMirror does NOT trigger parent — but no positive test for keyboard activation of row button per NFR-001 spec (FIND-302)
Stale HTMLButtonElement type assertion on now-div element (FIND-304)
Verified: edge cases tested for Space/Enter/Escape within CodeMirror during edit mode
Gap: blur-save silently discards body with control characters — no handler for this edge case (FIND-303)
CRITICAL: div[role='button'] onkeydown handler captures Space/Enter from ALL child elements including tag input — regression from native <button> behavior (FIND-301)
Verified: tabindex correctly set to -1 during edit mode, 0 when not editing and not disabled
Verified: onclick and onkeydown correctly removed during edit mode (undefined when isEditingThisRow is true)
Component structure is coherent: edit mode state, timers, event handlers all organized within FeedRow.svelte and feedRowEditMode.ts
Pure functions (validate_no_control_chars) cleanly separated from effectful shell (mount/unmount CodeMirror)
Advisory: prop test uses bun:test import while other test files use vitest — potential execution gap (FIND-305, low severity)
validate_no_control_chars is pure, deterministic, takes string input, returns {ok}/error result — directly testable
PROP-009 fast-check property tests cover control character validation (assuming bun test runner is available)
PROP-011 (mount/unmount idempotency) and PROP-012 (single edit mode) DOM tests present

reviewContext.sprintScope: Fix root cause of keyboard/mouse focus loss in inline CodeMirror editor by replacing <button> with <div role='button'>
